name: connpass
description: BeProuds Japanese tech-event platform — REST API for event listings, groups and RSVPs across meetups.

seo.title: connpass — Search / Recommendations API
seo.meta_description: connpass: BeProuds Japanese tech-event platform — REST API for event listings, groups and RSVPs across meetups.

when_to_use: Discover Japanese tech meetups via REST API
Event aggregation for developer community platforms
RSVP data integration for attendance tracking tools
Tech group search for community recommendation engines
Japanese developer event feed for portals and bots

pros: Best coverage of Japanese tech meetups and conferences
Free REST API for events, groups, and RSVPs
Stable schema used by community tools for years
No OAuth needed for public event reads
cons: API rate limits are strict and undocumented in English
Response format is quirky and lightly documented
No webhook or push updates for event changes
review.verdict: The default source for Japanese tech event data, but expect Japanese-first docs and basic polling-only access.
review.best_for: Apps aggregating Japanese tech community events or meetup analytics.
review.not_for: Global event platforms or real-time RSVP webhook workflows.
